case_title: PATEL, BAKULA vs. SANDERS, LEONARD et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, BAKULA COURT TRIAL SET FOR APR-23-2001 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

PETITION TO DISQUALIFY JUDGE MELLON DENIED FOR BEING UNTIMELY MADE. STILL NO PROOF OF SERVICE OF THE NOTICE FOR TODAY'S HEARING ON DEFENDANT. HEARING CONTINUED TO MAY 21, 2001 AT 9:00 AM, PLAINTIFF ORDERED TO GIVE NOTICE TO DEFENDANT AND TO SUBMIT PROOF OF SUCH NOTICE TO THE COURT.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT SANDERS, LEONARD ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
HRG CONTD TO 5-07-01 AT 9AM AND PLTFF ORDERED TO SUBMIT PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE TO DEFENDANT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANDERS, LEONARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 770 O'FARRELL STREET, ROOM #44 SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED
